fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Child tickets define implementation-ready behavior for selection focus, property-based rendering, panel-aware framing, and 2D presentation keyframing. 2. Browser and Playwright coverage explicitly cover deselection, tier transitions, panel overlap safety, 2D mode switching, and keyframed restore behavior. 3. Minimal glyph, hover reveal, and selected-state effect decisions are explicit and testable.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer][viewer-api] Graph focus and 2D presentation follow-up

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Child tickets define implementation-ready behavior for selection focus, property-based rendering, panel-aware framing, and 2D presentation keyframing. 2. fields.title: [ticket-viewer][viewer-api] Graph focus and 2D presentation follow-up

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Child tickets define implementation-ready behavior for stepwise focus falloff, property-based rendering tiers, panel-aware framing, and configurable 2D/keyframed presentation. 2. The graph node design explicitly covers the ordered tier ladder point-or-sphere → icon → label → compact → full, camera-mode-specific minimal glyphs, one-tier hover promotion, and selected-state effects. 3. Browser and Playwright coverage explicitly cover deselection, tier transitions, selected-node effects, panel overlap safety, 2D mode switching, configurable auto-keyframing, explicit keyframing, and restore behavior.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer][viewer-api] Graph focus and 2D presentation follow-up
